scenarios.name: auto_evolve_basic_package
scenarios.title: Auto-evolve basic package
scenarios.summary: Submits a mocked AI prompt and verifies nixmac reaches review with a generated Nix diff.
coverage: Main prompt input and send path
Mock provider response plumbing
Evolve review screen with non-empty diff
Generated diff includes the Darwin fonts module
knownGaps: Uses mocked model responses; it does not call live AI providers or apply/rebuild the generated config.

scenarios.name: discard_and_restore_state
scenarios.title: Discard and restore state
scenarios.summary: Exercises discard confirm/cancel behavior from the evolve review screen.
coverage: Prompt submission reaches evolve review
Discard confirmation returns to the initial prompt screen
Discard cancellation leaves the review state intact
knownGaps: Does not verify every rollback/history path or rebuild behavior after discard.

scenarios.name: manual_evolve_existing_changes
scenarios.title: Manual evolve existing changes
scenarios.summary: Runs sequential prompts and verifies the second change preserves the first generated diff.
coverage: Follow-up prompt from evolve review
Existing uncommitted change preservation
Generated diff contains both first and second package edits
knownGaps: Uses mocked model responses and does not run the final apply/rebuild step.

scenarios.name: settings_provider_change
scenarios.title: Settings and provider tabs
scenarios.summary: Opens Settings and verifies the General, AI Models, API Keys, and Preferences tabs plus key controls render.
coverage: Settings button opens the dialog
All four settings tabs are navigable
Each tab renders its expected heading
Critical provider, API key, diagnostics, and confirmation controls are visible
knownGaps: Checks visibility of key settings controls; it does not mutate every field, verify real API keys, or call live providers.

scenarios.name: onboarding_existing_repo
scenarios.title: Onboarding existing repo
scenarios.summary: Connects an existing nix-darwin repo and verifies the app reaches the prompt screen.
coverage: Setup screen renders
Configuration directory can be selected
Host selection is populated and accepted
Onboarding completes to the main prompt screen
knownGaps: Uses a prepared fixture repo; it does not cover every arbitrary user flake shape.

scenarios.name: release_dmg_app_translocation_smoke
scenarios.title: Release DMG launch smoke
scenarios.summary: Launches the installed /Applications app on a real Mac and verifies a usable first screen.
coverage: Build artifact can be installed on the Mac runner
App launches from /Applications
First screen renders enough nixmac text to rule out startup/App Translocation crashes
Publishes a full-screen recording as proof
knownGaps: Launch smoke only; it does not exercise Nix installation, settings, or evolve/apply flows.

scenarios.name: install_nix_clean_machine
scenarios.title: Install Nix on clean machine
scenarios.summary: Runs the real Install Nix flow on a clean Mac and verifies Nix works afterward.
coverage: App launches into the Nix install flow
Install Nix button can be clicked
Determinate Nix package downloads and installs
App detects Nix and prefetches darwin-rebuild
Final Nix binary verification passes
Publishes a full-screen recording as proof
knownGaps: Runs on one configured Mac runner and macOS version; it does not cover every hardware or OS variant.
